response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed on-screen text '#尾丸ポルカ生誕祭2026' at 00:26 and song credits 'ETERNAL BLAZE' and '作曲: 上松範康 (Elements Garden)' at 00:48. 2. Identified performer in video as Omaru Polka. 3. Identified original artist for 'ETERNAL BLAZE' as Nana Mizuki via general knowledge and search results. 4. Used search string '"ETERNAL BLAZE" Nana Mizuki Japanese and English lyrics' to retrieve lyrics. 5. Mapped scene start/end times based on the start of the music (00:33) and the end of the video (04:59).
response.global_summary: A 3D virtual concert performance featuring Omaru Polka performing 'ETERNAL BLAZE', held for her birthday festival in 2026. The video consists of an intro with stage effects and audience participation, followed by the main vocal performance.

scenes.description: Introductory scene showing the stage setup, concert lighting effects, and an audience holding lightsticks, with the text #尾丸ポルカ生誕祭2026 displayed in the top right.
Omaru Polka performs 'ETERNAL BLAZE' on stage, with the title 'ETERNAL BLAZE' and credits appearing on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
遥か天空（そら）響いている
祈りは奇跡に
真夜中の蒼に溶けて
流れてく涙の粒
迷いなく包み込む温もりに出逢った
真っ白な雪のように
どこまでも素直なコトバ
鉄の羽根纏った
僕を動かしてく
傷つくたびに
優しくなれる
君のその笑顔だけ守り抜きたい
願いはひとつ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The prayer echoing in the distant sky turns into a miracle
Flowing teardrops melt into the paleness of the dark sky
I met a warmth that wraps around me without hesitation
Like pure white snow
Words as honest as can be
The iron wings I wear move me
Every time I get hurt, I can become kinder
I only want to protect that smile of yours
My wish is one
